things.name: Kofar Mata Dye Pits
things.description: 500-year-old indigo dye pits still operating using traditional West African methods

things.name: Kurmi Market
things.description: One of West Africa's oldest and largest markets dating back to the 15th century

things.name: Gidan Makama Museum
things.description: Emir's historic palace complex turned museum of Kano's history

things.name: Kano City Walls (Old City)
things.description: Medieval earthen walls up to 14m high surrounding one of Africa's oldest cities

things.name: Emir's Palace (Gidan Rumfa)
things.description: 15th-century Hausa palace of the Emir of Kano with mud-brick architecture

things.name: Central Mosque of Kano
things.description: Largest mosque in West Africa built in 1951

things.name: Crafts Village (Kofar Wambai)
things.description: Traditional leather working, weaving and blacksmithing

things.name: Kano Museum
things.description: Artefacts from the ancient Hausa and Kanuri kingdoms of northern Nigeria

things.name: Dala Hill
things.description: Sacred hill at the centre of the ancient city with spiritual significance

things.name: Tuwo Shinkafa & Miyan Kuka
things.description: Kano's staple - rice porridge with baobab leaf soup and dried fish
